task: You are a QA agent, you are testing a website for QA issues. Explore visible controls and form flows with short, targeted actions. Include 'QA: ...' in memory only when behavior appears incorrect or unintended (broken control, unintended logic, invalid state transition, or surprising navigation, etc). Do not include a QA note when no issue is observed.

transitions.observation: memory: Testing 'Add starter bundle' button (index 9) to verify its functionality, as previous tests on individual item buttons revealed bugs. | next_goal: Click the 'Add starter bundle' button (index 9) and observe the cart's response.

memory: The 'Add starter bundle' button populated the cart with 'Focus Beans' ($12.00) and 'Citrus Tonic' ($8.00), total $20.00. Proceeding to test the discount button. | next_goal: Click the 'Apply 10% launch discount' button and verify if the total updates correctly.
memory: Discount applied correctly. Proceeding to test form submission with email and delivery speed. | next_goal: Fill in the email field, select a delivery speed, and place the order.

memory: Successfully tested checkout flow. Refreshing page to test individual product 'Add to cart' buttons (indices 10, 11, 12) to verify reported bugs. | next_goal: Refresh the page and test 'Add to cart' for 'Focus Beans' (index 10).
memory: Page refreshed, cart is empty. Testing 'Add to cart' for 'Focus Beans' (index 248). | next_goal: Click 'Add to cart' for 'Focus Beans' (index 248) and verify the cart contents.

transitions.qa_observation: Clicking 'Add to cart' for 'Focus Beans' (index 248) added 'Explorer Map' ($15.00) to the cart instead of 'Focus Beans' ($12.00). Proceeding to test 'Citrus Tonic' (index 249).
transitions.observation: next_goal: Click 'Add to cart' for 'Citrus Tonic' (index 249) and verify if it adds the correct item.

memory: Tested 'Focus Beans' (index 248) -> Added 'Explorer Map' instead. Tested 'Citrus Tonic' (index 249) -> Did nothing. Now testing 'Explorer Map' (index 250). | next_goal: Click 'Add to cart' for 'Explorer Map' (index 250) to test its functionality.

done.text:
I have completed the QA testing for the Northline Market website. The following issues were identified:

1. 'Add to cart' button for 'Focus Beans' (index 248) is broken: It adds 'Explorer Map' to the cart instead of the selected item.
2. 'Add to cart' button for 'Citrus Tonic' (index 249) is broken: It does not add any item to the cart.
3. 'Add to cart' button for 'Explorer Map' (index 250) is broken: It adds 'QA Tonic' to the cart instead of the selected item.

The 'Add starter bundle' button, 'Apply 10% launch discount' button, and the checkout form submission flow were tested and found to be working correctly.

transitions.qa_observation: Clicking 'Add to cart' for 'Focus Beans' (index 248) adds 'Explorer Map' instead. QA: Clicking 'Add to cart' for 'Citrus Tonic' (index 249) does nothing. QA: Clicking 'Add to cart' for 'Explorer Map' (index 250) adds 'QA Tonic' instead. The 'Add starter bundle', 'Apply 10% launch discount', and checkout flow work correctly.
